title: aglaia iloilo
intro: Aglaia iloilo, also known as the Iloilo aglaia or Apitong, is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of the Philippines. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Aglaia iloilo include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. In herbal preparations, Aglaia iloilo is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
